# Learning Event Example
LearningEvent(
    event_type='pattern_discovered',
    description='Bullish trend pattern discovered for AAPL',
    confidence_before=0.65,
    confidence_after=0.75,
    impact_score=0.85,
    market_conditions={'symbol': 'AAPL', 'pattern_type': 'bullish'}
)

# Performance Metrics Example
PerformanceMetrics(
    portfolio_value=10500.0,
    total_pnl=500.0,
    sharpe_ratio=1.25,
    win_rate=0.68,
    learning_progress=progress_tracking
)
